name: Russia
summary: Day 76. **RUSSIA-CUSTODIAN PATH NOW STRUCTURALLY DISPLACED BY TRUMP CHINA-CUSTODIAN DOOR-OPENING (A1 May 14)**: Trump publicly stated 'only Washington or Beijing can retrieve Iran's nuclear material if Tehran agrees to hand it over' (CONFIRMED RHETORIC — Times of Israel May 14 liveblog primary) — explicitly substituting China for Russia as the proposed HEU custodian. US officials had reportedly ruled out Russia-as-custodian per multiple May reports. The Russia-HEU-custodian non-event is now MEANINGFUL: at Day 15 of 21 from Putin-Araghchi meeting there is no formal announcement, AND the picture has shifted today by Trump's explicit 'Washington or Beijing' framing in Beijing. The 21-day window (closes 2026-05-18) is now operationally vestigial — even if Putin formalises the offer, the US has publicly pivoted to a different jurisdiction. **Russia structurally sidelined on the operational diplomatic architecture** but retains: rhetorical support for Iran via state media (Pravda EN, TASS — TASS continues to amplify EIA forecast cuts as 'the West cannot sustain $100 oil'), UNSC veto, Bushehr commitment, Russian-oil waiver to India (~1.9 mbpd preserved). Pravda May 14: silent on Trump's China-HEU-custodian statement. TASS continues bearish-oil amplification. PRIOR (May 13): No party publicly named Russia as the custodian candidate, but Putin's standing offer (May 9) is the implicit candidate per market analyst read. **US has not confirmed the uranium-transfer detail's specific custodian — Russia formally sidelined but operationally available.** **TRUMP REJECTED IRAN'S RESPONSE AS 'TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE'** — so the HEU-transfer-with-return-clause is now in rejection state; if any framework is salvaged, Russia-custodian path remains open. **B3 TRUMP WH SIT-ROOM MAY 11 considering renewed strikes; Trump China visit May 14-15 = forced pause window** — Russia not at the table in Beijing. Pravda (Russian state) published the May 10 Doha bulk-carrier-strike attribution to 'two Iranian UAVs' — UNCONFIRMED by Western forensics; Russian-state single-side adversarial chain. TASS/Pravda SILENT on the WSJ UAE-Lavan revelation (likely because UAE-as-third-combatant complicates Russia's preferred US-Israel-vs-Iran framing). Russian oil flow to Indian refiners ~1.9 mbpd preserved under 30-day waiver. Uranium URA +3.7% 1D / +12.3% 1M — Cameco/Kazatomprom proxy bid stays strong on Iran HEU concession + AI-power demand. PRIOR FRAMING (preserved): Russia retains rhetorical support for Iran via state media + UNSC veto + Bushehr two new nuclear units commitment. **The HEU-custodian path is the most consequential structural opening for Russia in cycle — if Iran's response is salvaged (post-Beijing) and Russia is formally named as HEU custodian, Russia's strategic position vis-à-vis nuclear file regulation strengthens materially.** The 14-point MOU's 'Iran ships out highly-enriched uranium stockpile' provision necessarily requires a custodian — if not Russia, then potentially the IAEA, Kazakhstan (mentioned in earlier-cycle reporting), or US-based facility. Peskov reaffirmed via Pravda EN April 18 (and reiterated to India Today early April) that Russia's offer to take Iran's enriched uranium 'remains active' but the US has rejected the proposal. JPost specifically described the MOU provision as 'Tehran give away enriched uranium' (custodian undefined). The Pakistan track has displaced Russia as the operational mediator. **The 21-day formal-proposal window from prior brief (RESOLVED-NO at Day 9) needs reframing: Russia is sidelined as mediator, BUT could be reactivated as uranium custodian — different role and remains live.** Russia retains structural facets: rhetorical support for Iran via state media (Pravda EN, TASS), intelligence support via permanent communications channel, UNSC veto, Bushehr two new nuclear units commitment. Russian-oil waiver (30-day India extension) preserves ~1.9 mbpd Russian flow to Indian refiners. URA +7.5% partly reflects HEU custodian path legitimization (Cameco 24% of URA, AI power demand intact). Pravda Trump May 6 ran 'IDF preparing large-scale Iran op' single-source claim — REPORTED only, NOT verified mainstream Western media; Russian adversarial-media chain.

active_triggers.condition: Russia announces formal proposal as nuclear-material custodian within 14 days of Putin-Araghchi meeting (by 2026-05-11)
active_triggers.expired_2026-05-14: Window closed at Day 14/21 (May 11) without formal announcement; today (Day 15) Trump publicly substituted China for Russia as proposed HEU custodian in Beijing summit. Even if Putin reactivates the offer, US has publicly pivoted to different jurisdiction. Trigger structurally displaced, not just unmet.

active_triggers.condition: China-as-HEU-custodian framework formally accepted by Iran + US within 30 days (by 2026-06-13)
active_triggers.note: Trump publicly opened HEU-via-China custodian door at Trump-Xi summit Day 1 (CONFIRMED RHETORIC). Xi has NOT publicly accepted. Iran ambassador to China already laid public scaffolding for China as 'political balancing partner.' Trigger requires operational acceptance, not rhetorical door-opening.

recent_signals.headline: **A1 / A8 RUSSIA-HEU-CUSTODIAN PATH STRUCTURALLY DISPLACED — TRUMP PUBLICLY SUBSTITUTED CHINA FOR RUSSIA AT THE CUSTODIAN ROLE AT BEIJING SUMMIT DAY 1**: 'only Washington or Beijing can retrieve Iran's nuclear material if Tehran agrees to hand it over' (CONFIRMED RHETORIC — Times of Israel May 14 liveblog primary). US officials had reportedly ruled out Russia-as-custodian per multiple May reports. The Russia-HEU-custodian non-event is now MEANINGFUL at Day 15 of 21 from Putin-Araghchi: no formal Russia announcement, AND today's Trump statement explicitly pivots jurisdiction. Even if Putin reactivates the offer, US has publicly pivoted. The 21-day window (closes May 18) is operationally vestigial. Pravda May 14: silent on Trump's China-HEU statement (Russian state-media protecting institutional position of unannounced offer). TASS continues to amplify EIA forecast cuts as 'the West cannot sustain $100 oil' = Russian state-media continues to amplify the bearish-oil case (commercial-strategic alignment with Russia's preferred narrative that war pressure on US is structural). Russian-oil waiver to India (~1.9 mbpd) preserved.
sources: Times of Israel May 14 liveblog (Trump HEU-via-China)
recent_signals.verification: Trump HEU-via-China statement = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (ToI primary); Russia-HEU-custodian path displacement = INFERRED from Trump's explicit Washington-or-Beijing framing (no formal Russia withdrawal announcement); Russian state-media silence on China pivot = CONFIRMED ABSENCE.

PUTIN-ARAGHCHI APR 27 MEETING REAFFIRMED APR 13 STANDING OFFER, DID NOT TABLE NEW FORMAL PROPOSAL — DAY 1 OF 14-DAY CUST

recent_signals.headline: PUTIN-ARAGHCHI KREMLIN MEETING — RUSSIA FORMALLY ENTERS DIPLOMATIC ARCHITECTURE AS POTENTIAL NUCLEAR-CUSTODIAN

historical_summaries.summary: 2 signals. Russia providing intelligence to Iran including data on US military positions

10 signals. Russia remains an intelligence/diplomatic supporter of Iran | Russia friendly-flag in Iran's three-tier Hormuz system per Bloomberg Tracker — vessels flagged to Russia continue to transit | Russia and China vetoed Bahrain's UNSC resolution to keep Hormuz open (April 7, 11-2 vote, France abstained)
